## Type of change

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No customer-specific data
- [ ] No tenant IDs, client IDs, secrets or tokens
- [ ] No internal server names or domains
- [ ] No generated reports or output files
- [ ] Tested in a non-production environment
- [ ] PSScriptAnalyzer passes
- [ ] Gitleaks passes
